transcript: Speaker A: நங்களுக்கு இந்த luxury brand-க்கு கொஞ்சம் premium-ஆன concept வேணும் [We need a premium concept for this luxury brand] Speaker B: Yeah... நம்ம whole vibe ரொம்ப... Bou-kay' மாதிரி வச்சுக்கணும் [Yeah... we should keep our whole vibe very... 'Bou-kay' style] Speaker C: Bou-kay? Speaker B: Yeah... luxury bou-kay aesthetic Speaker A: டேய் அது 'Bouquet' இல்ல... 'Bouquet' கரெக்ட் pronounce பண்ணுடா [Hey, that's not 'Bouquet'... 'Bouquet' pronounce it correctly] Speaker B: English-la எல்லாமே same same-ஆ எழுதுற மாதிரி ஏன் இருக்கு [Why is everything in English written the same way?] Worst part எனக்கு என்னன்னா எனக்கு அந்த word தெரியும் ஆனா pronunciation தான் தப்பு [The worst part for me is that I know the word but the pronunciation is wrong] அதான் இப்போ நான் SpeakX use பண்றேன் [That's why I am using SpeakX now] AI Avatar: Boujee, not bouquet Speaker B: ஹான் bro, புரிஞ்சிடுச்சு [Yeah bro, understood] Speaker D: சில நேரம் English problem grammar இல்ல... சில words தான் life-அ damage பண்ணிடும் [Sometimes the English problem is not grammar... some words just damage life] Speaker B: SpeakX-ஓட AI instant-ஆ pronunciation correct பண்ணுது. Real conversation-ல awkward pause வராம இருக்கு. [SpeakX's AI corrects pronunciation instantly. It prevents awkward pauses in real conversations.] We need a boujee luxury feel Speaker A: Indeed. Minimal but premium. Speaker B: English கத்துக்கிறதை விட அதை பேசி practice பண்றது தான் முக்கியம். First 20 questions free-யா இருக்கு, SpeakX try பண்ணுங்க. [More than learning English, speaking and practicing it is important. First 20 questions are free, try SpeakX.] Speak confidently, download SpeakX.
on_screen_text: Indha luxury, premium-aana concept venum, Bou-kay, Bou-kay?, luxury bou-kay aesthetic, Bouquet, English-la, Worst, Pronunciation, SpeakX, Boujee, not bouquet, Haan bro, purinjiduchu, Sila, grammar illa, sila words dhaan life-ah, damage pannidum, We need a boujee luxury feel, Indeed. Minimal but premium., English kathukkaradhu, adha pesi, practice pannradhu, dhaan mukkiyam, First 20 question free, SpeakX, Speak confidently, SpeakX, KEY TO CONFIDENCE
summary: A workplace skit highlights the embarrassment of mispronouncing English words like 'boujee'. The protagonist introduces SpeakX, an AI-powered app that corrects pronunciation instantly to avoid awkward pauses. The ad concludes with a call to action to download SpeakX, offering the first 20 questions for free.
